disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden painless shedding of a clump of scalp hair on brushing, leaving one well-defined smooth bald patch, discovered this evening
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what happened?
When did you first notice the bald patch?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was just brushing my hair this evening and a whole clump came out, and now there's a smooth round bald spot. It didn't hurt at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild transient localised itch of the area earlier in the afternoon before the shedding
trigger_question_examples: Was there any itch, pain or tingling in the area beforehand?
Did you notice anything before the hair came out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, the spot felt a bit itchy this afternoon, but only mildly and it settled.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patch is asymptomatic to the patient now — no pain, no burning, no tenderness
trigger_question_examples: Is the bald area sore or tender at all now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it doesn't hurt or sting — I can't really feel it at all, it just looks bald.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No scaling, flaking, crusting, pus, blistering or spreading rash reported by the patient
trigger_question_examples: Is there any flaking, scaling, crusting or pus on the patch?
Is the skin broken, weepy or spreading?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, the skin looks smooth and clean to me — no flakes, no crust, nothing weeping or spreading.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm not totally sure I'd know what to look for, but it looks normal to me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no feeling unwell, no rash elsewhere, no joint pain or swelling (systemic screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any fevers, feeling generally unwell, rashes elsewhere or aching/swollen joints?
Have you felt sick in yourself at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers, I feel fine in myself otherwise — no other rashes, no joint pain. Just this patch and how upset I am about it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No hair loss elsewhere (eyebrows, eyelashes, body) and no prior episodes
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost hair anywhere else — eyebrows, eyelashes, body?
Has anything like this happened before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nowhere else, and it's never happened before — that's why it frightened me so much.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe acute anxiety and fear of serious systemic illness driving the urgent presentation
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling about all this?
What are you most worried it might be?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm honestly panicking — I'm scared it means something is really wrong with me, like a serious disease. That's why I couldn't wait.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular prescription medications and no known allergies
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take any regular medicines and I don't have any allergies that I know of.
